mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping ON fileInfo.REQUEST_NO = mapping.REQUEST_NO AND fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = mapping.OBJECT_ID LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST request ON mapping.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO WHERE mapping.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
mapper.update:
UPDATE docs_SEND SET TITLE='111' WHERE
SEND_ID IN #{PdmDeployHistoryParam.sendId}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT REQ.REQUEST_DESC FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL REQ WHERE REQ.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND REQ.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST') AS requestDesc , REQ.APPROVAL_LINE_ID AS approvalLineId , REQ.REQUEST_NO AS requestNo , REQ.DEPLOY_TERM AS deployTerm , REQ.REQUEST_PURPOSE AS requestPurpose , REQ.PROTECT_YN AS protectYn , (SELECT REQUEST_DESC FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT') AS rejectDesc , (SELECT ACTUAL_USER_CD FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND APPROVAL_GRADE_CD = 'TL') AS approvalUserCd , FN_GET_CD_NM('distributeMethodCd', (CASE WHEN req.DEPLOY_NORMAL_YN = 'Y' THEN 'general' WHEN req.DEPLOY_SPECIAL_YN = 'Y' THEN 'security' WHEN req.PRINT_YN = 'Y' THEN 'viewPrint' ELSE '' END), 'ko') AS distributeMethodNm FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL DETAIL JOIN DOCS_REQUEST REQ ON REQ.REQUEST_NO = DETAIL.REQUEST_NO WHERE DETAIL.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND DETAIL.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT'
